title: The eras
headline: The chat arrived in waves: Johns Hopkins University opens in 2013, NeuroData Lab (Johns Hopkins) in 2014, Bau Lab (Northeastern / NDIF) in 2022 — and MATS has landed 4 separate cohorts since 2022.
